morning: Good morning! The scent of spring flowers wishes you a day full of energy and joy.
Good morning! Spring greets you with fresh air and gentle sunshine — have a wonderful day!
Good morning! Let the spring breeze bring you optimism and vitality for the day ahead.
afternoon: Good afternoon! The spring sun accompanies your afternoon with warmth and light.
Good afternoon! Let the spring breeze and blooming colors bring you joy this afternoon.
Good afternoon! Spring is showing its splendor — we hope your day is just as beautiful.
evening: Good evening! Spring has spread its colors today — have a pleasant and peaceful evening!
Good evening! The spring evening brings tranquility and the sweet scent of flowers.
Good evening! May this spring evening bring you peace and contentment.
night: Good night! Let the stillness of the spring night carry you toward beautiful dreams.
Good night! The spring night is gentle — blessed rest and sweet dreams!
Good night! The song of spring crickets wishes you a calm and restful sleep.

morning: Good morning! A sunny summer day awaits you — enjoy every moment!
Good morning! The warm rays of the summer sun light up your day with energy and good spirits.
Good morning! Summer gives you a long, sunny day — make the most of it with joy!
afternoon: Good afternoon! We hope you're enjoying this warm and sunny summer afternoon.
Good afternoon! The summer warmth brings joys and beautiful memories — have a lovely day!
Good afternoon! Summer is in full swing — we hope this afternoon brings you only pleasant moments.
evening: Good evening! The summer sunset paints the sky in fiery colors — a magical evening!
Good evening! The coolness of the summer evening is welcome after a sunny day — enjoy!
Good evening! Summer evenings are full of magic and calm — savor every moment.
night: Good night! The summer night, with its shining stars, wishes you pleasant dreams.
Good night! Let the warm summer breeze bring you calm and restful sleep.
Good night! Under the starry summer sky, we wish you full rest and beautiful dreams.

morning: Good morning! Autumn paints your day in shades of gold and rust — a wonderful morning!
Good morning! The crisp autumn air brings energy for a productive and beautiful day.
Good morning! Autumn has rolled out its golden carpet of leaves — a fruitful and joyful day!
afternoon: Good afternoon! Autumn's colors make this afternoon truly special and memorable.
Good afternoon! A walk among autumn's golden leaves can bring much joy today.
Good afternoon! Autumn dresses the world in warm colors — we hope your day is just as colorful.
evening: Good evening! Autumn brings quiet, contemplative evenings — have a pleasant one!
Good evening! May the autumn evening bring you comfort and peace of mind.
Good evening! An autumn evening with a warm cup and cherished moments — just right.
night: Good night! Cool autumn nights are perfect for restful sleep — sleep well!
Good night! Let the stillness of the autumn night carry you to beautiful, restful dreams.
Good night! Autumn brings long, peaceful nights — blessed rest!

morning: Good morning! Winter has put on its white mantle — we wish you a warm drink and a beautiful day!
Good morning! Winter's cold cannot freeze the warmth with which we wish you a wonderful day!
Good morning! Winter's ice crystals are shining — a bright and joyful day!
afternoon: Good afternoon! May the winter daylight bring you joy and warmth of heart.
Good afternoon! We wish you a cozy winter afternoon, full of warmth and cherished moments.
Good afternoon! Winter brings its own stillness and beauty — a pleasant afternoon!
evening: Good evening! A winter evening is perfect for warm moments with loved ones.
Good evening! The glow and stillness of a winter evening wishes you an unforgettable night.
Good evening! May this winter evening bring you warmth, good cheer, and tranquility.
night: Good night! Long winter nights are perfect for deep rest — sleep tight!
Good night! Winter covers everything in silence — beautiful dreams and blessed rest!
Good night! Under winter's white blanket, we wish you peaceful sleep and warm dreams.

new_year: Happy New Year! May the new year bring you health, happiness, and fulfillment.
Happy New Year! A new year, new hopes, and new joys!
union_day: Happy Union Day! Long live united Romania!
Let us celebrate Union Day together with pride and gratitude.
easter: Christ is Risen! We wish you a Holy Easter full of light and joy.
Happy Easter! May the resurrection bring peace and joy to your home.
labour_day: Happy Labour Day! We wish you a well-deserved day of rest and relaxation.
Happy 1st of May! May your work always be rewarded and appreciated.
childrens_day: Happy Children's Day! May we all preserve the purity and joy of childhood.
We wish you a special day on the 1st of June! May the joy of childhood always live in your heart.
assumption: Happy Assumption Day! Peace and blessings to your home.
We wish you a holy Assumption Day, full of gratitude and faith.
saint_andrew: Happy Saint Andrew's Day, protector of Romania!
Happy name day to all who bear the name Andrew!
national_day: Happy National Day of Romania! Long live Romania!
Happy 1st of December! Let us proudly celebrate our country's national day.
saint_nicholas: Happy Saint Nicholas Day! May Saint Nick bring you only wonderful gifts.
christmas: Merry Christmas! May the birth of the Savior bring peace and light to your soul.
Happy Holidays! May you spend time with loved ones full of warmth and joy.
